objective: Close F-0148 by making every authorized content, organization, and personal AI generation command fail closed with the existing quota_insufficient category before task persistence, lifecycle claim, Provider or RAG execution, result or ai_call_log writes, success audit, or formal and training materialization while Cost Calibration and a durable quota ledger remain unapproved. Existing read, detail, review, history, and cancellation flows remain available.
blockedFiles: quota values, pricing, Cost Calibration, balance or reservation/deduction ledger, schema/migration, real database/data, Provider/external call or configuration, secret/env, capability/role/entitlement/default quota expansion, dependency, deployment, PR, force-push, non-canonical remote, Minimal Safety Kernel, guard/smoke, Subagent, UI expansion, or any other finding

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: authorized content or organization admin route and authorized personal or employee route -> server-owned AI generation request policy -> task persistence and lifecycle claim -> Provider/RAG execution -> result, ai_call_log and success audit -> formal, organization-training or learning consumer
preRedImpactScan.confirmedRootCause: Production request construction hard-codes isQuotaAvailable=true for platform, organization, and personal generation, and the admin persistence adapter records true as a database fact. The shared request policy already rejects false with quota_insufficient, but both route paths persist or execute before a trustworthy quota fact exists.

acceptance: authentication, role, edition, object scope and request shape are validated before the quota gate so unauthorized callers cannot probe generation capability

new content, organization and personal or employee generation commands expose the existing quota_insufficient machine category and a safe unavailable message without inventing balance, pricing, deduction or quota facts

quota-unavailable generation performs zero task create/reuse writes, lifecycle claims, Provider or RAG execution, result or ai_call_log writes, success audit and formal, training or learning materialization
retry, reclaim, active, failed, cancelled, stale and exhausted task commands cannot trigger another Provider attempt while quota facts remain unavailable
existing terminal success is either returned only through an exact immutable read path or the POST command fails closed without persistence or Provider replay
GET, history, detail, review and authorized cancellation paths remain available and retain existing authorization and redaction boundaries
admin persistence defensive insert values store is_quota_available=false and no production isQuotaAvailable=true default remains
F-0148 closes only because the unlimited Provider-call failure mode becomes statically unreachable; Cost Calibration and a durable quota ledger remain unimplemented and require future fresh approval

approvalAmendments.scope: explicit per-test Vitest mock that changes only isQuotaAvailable from false to true at the shared request-policy boundary for pre-existing after-admission pipeline regressions
approvalAmendments.restoreDiscipline: each opted-in test calls the named harness and afterEach resets it to false
approvalAmendments.productionUnreachable: no production export, factory option, runtime configuration, environment variable, request field, token, globalThis value, or source-file quota override
approvalAmendments.evidenceClassification: mocked tests prove only the dormant after-admission pipeline; F-0148 closure relies on unmocked production quota-gate tests, zero-side-effect assertions, and production source scans

approvalAmendments.scope: change the canonical student personal generation request draft quota fact from true to false and prove the submitted payload remains fail-closed without altering UI behavior
approvalAmendments.authorityBoundary: the client-side false value is not an independent quota authority; server admission remains the only production authority
approvalAmendments.productionScan: exclude tests and fixtures and require no isQuotaAvailable true or is_quota_available true production default

conditions: actual diff is an allowedFiles subset and no untracked or extra changes exist
base, origin, permission contraction and fail-closed semantics do not drift
no quota values, ledger, schema/migration, real database, Provider, dependency, external side effect, capability expansion or mechanism change
focused regression, lint, typecheck, build, format/diff and main-thread adversarial review are GREEN
the test-only quota harness is explicit opt-in, restored after each test, production-unreachable, and excluded from F-0148 closure evidence
single commit, ff-only merge, canonical origin/master ordinary push, sync check and short branch cleanup

freshValidation.evidenceBoundary: mocked after-admission tests are regression-only and are not F-0148 quota-availability evidence
